name: oasis-odata-openapi
description: OASIS - Convert OData CSDL specifications (XML/JSON) to OpenAPI 3.0 format

scripts.build:win-x64: npm run bundle && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-win-x64.exe
scripts.build:mac-x64: npm run bundle && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-mac-x64
scripts.build:mac-arm64: npm run bundle && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-mac-arm64
scripts.build:linux-x64: npm run bundle && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-linux-x64
scripts.build:linux-arm64: npm run bundle && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-linux-arm64
scripts.build:all: npm run bundle && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-win-x64.exe && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-mac-x64 && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-mac-arm64 && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-linux-x64 && bun build dist/cli-bundled.cjs --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/oasis-converter-linux-arm64

author: Microsoft Corporation
